title: Worldwide Story Platform Allocation Manifest
description: Maps each canonical story to the platform families / markets / locales it is allocated to. Authority: docs/specs/WORLDWIDE_ALLOCATION_MODEL_V1_SPEC.md (OPD-20260627-001). The production manifest target is artifacts/distribution/story_platform_allocation.json. canonical_id is the LOCALE-STABLE book_id: identical across every locale edition of a story. A market edition is a localization of the canonical story, NOT a new story.

generated.description: ISO date the manifest was generated.

records.description: One record per canonical story. allocations[] fans out across families/markets/locales.

canonical_id.description: Locale-stable book_id. Identical across every locale edition. The localization key. Net-new stories mint a new canonical_id; translations reuse it.

brand.description: Brand id (e.g. stillness_press). From market_catalog_registry.yaml roster.

topic.description: Canonical topic (one of the 17 in catalog_generation_config.yaml::topics) or a market-only topic for topic-fit-gap net-new authoring.

engine.description: Authoring/production engine for the canonical narrative.

allocations.description: Per-family/market/locale placements of this canonical story.

market.description: market_id from market_catalog_registry.yaml (e.g. germany, japan, china).

locale.description: Locale of THIS edition (catalog_generation_config.yaml::locales). Same canonical_id + different locale = distinct edition (A1, permitted). Same canonical_id + same locale + same cross_references family = duplicate (BLOCKED, spec §7).

status.description: Lifecycle / gate state. suppressed_dup = set by the anti-spam gate when spec §7 R2 would be violated. blocked_open_flag = planned but held pending a §3 residual.

flag.description: Required when status=blocked_open_flag: the open residual gating this row (spec §3).

exclusivity.description: Only meaningful for manga_exclusive_originals (opt-in lock) or to mark a non-exclusive default. ACX/KDP exclusivity is NEVER permitted (spec R4) and has no value here.
